title: The Vee Hive Minecraft Server
description: A small cobblemon and magic pack hosted by me! We're neurodivergent and queer owned who welcome everyone! If you enjoy cozy, laid back experiences, join us!
body:
Welcome to The Vee Hive Minecraft Server! I'm Vee, the owner of this modpack! This modpack is built and hosted by me, creating a wonderful combination of some of my favourite things! If you enjoy casual experiences, pokemon or adventuring then this is for you! We're a very cozy server with no PvP, rules listed in game and a variety of fun features for everyone! 

I own my own community over on YouTube at @euceravee and my streams also go through to Twitch too! For all the latest information on the pack, you can join the Discord over at discord.gg/euceravee to join us!

The server isn't open 24/7, but I always make sure to ping the Discord role before I pop it back up!
